privileged_info_summary: The task involves restoring a patient record for 'Bernadette SOUBIROUS' from a database backup in a MedinTux medical information system. The target patient has the surname SOUBIROUS and given name Bernadette, matching the historical saint who lived in Lourdes, France. The required database tables are IndexNomPrenom (search index) and fchpat (patient details). The backup SQL file is created at /home/ga/Documents/medintux_backup.sql using mysqldump. However, the claimed date of birth (1954-02-18) is fabricated and does not match historical records—Bernadette Soubirous was actually born on 7 January 1844. All data is synthetically generated during task setup, not from real patient records.
